Expertise

Services

01

Power BI Reporting & Data Intelligence

End-to-end BI solutions from data architecture to executive dashboard. I design scalable data models, build automated pipelines, and craft intuitive, audit-ready reporting platforms that replace fragmented Excel landscapes with a single source of truth.

Data Modelling UX/UI Design SharePoint Integration Security & Governance
02

Presentation Design

Strategic, high-impact presentations for leadership and client audiences. From narrative architecture to visual execution — transforming complex analysis into clear, compelling stories. Every slide is a considered communication decision.

Executive Decks Data Visualization Visual Storytelling Brand Alignment
03

PowerPoint Training & Workshops

Practical, structured training programs that permanently elevate a team's presentation capabilities. From two-day intensive workshops to ongoing coaching — building lasting skills in design thinking, layout, and visual communication.

Workshop Design Team Training Facilitation Template Creation
04

Project Management & PMO

Reliable delivery structure for complex, multi-stream programs. I establish governance frameworks, run PMO functions, and create the reporting cadences that give leadership clear visibility into progress, risks, and decisions.

PMO Setup Executive Reporting ServiceNow Stakeholder Management
05

Business Analysis & Requirements Engineering

Structured elicitation, documentation, and alignment of functional and technical requirements. Translating ambiguous stakeholder needs into clear, actionable specifications that drive delivery — across tools, processes, and global rollouts.

Requirements Workshops KPI Frameworks Process Design Vendor Evaluation
06

Power Platform & Automation

Low-code solutions that eliminate manual overhead and create scalable, automated workflows within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. From requirements-gathering tools to interactive dashboards — delivering digital efficiency with precision.

PowerApps Power Automate SharePoint M365 Integration

Portfolio

Selected Work

2023–2025

Telecommunications · Cybersecurity

GRC Reporting Platform — Full Build

Designed and built an entire Governance, Risk & Compliance reporting system from the ground up for a global telecommunications group — replacing fragmented Excel landscapes with a unified, automated Power BI platform. Covered Risk Management, Assessment Governance, Awareness, and Policy reporting as a single source of truth.

Outcome

Audit-ready dashboards adopted organization-wide. Praised by both compliance and network departments for technical quality, speed, and autonomy. Enabled successful audit presentations and positioned the platform for future regulatory expansion.

Power BI Architect · Data Modeler · UX/UI Designer · Project Coordinator

GRC Reporting Data Architecture Requirements Engineering Stakeholder Management
2025

Telecommunications · Network Security

Network Security Hardening — Compliance Reporting

Designed and delivered a comprehensive security reporting solution covering 10,000+ network assets and their full remediation lifecycle. Independently connected Power BI to an Oracle database, built a 5-level role-based security access concept, and created multi-layered reporting for management, middle, and operational audiences.

Outcome

Used actively by 50+ stakeholders across a highly demanding network engineering domain. Praised for speed, technical quality, and independent problem-solving. Enabled follow-up engagements beyond the initial cybersecurity scope.

Security Reporting Lead · Solution Architect · Data Modeler

Security Analytics Oracle DB Integration Access Governance Compliance Reporting
2023–2025

Management Consulting · Internal

Internal Demo Platform — BI Showcase Suite

Led the end-to-end development of a professional Power BI demo platform used in client pitches and sales conversations. Built synthetic datasets reflecting real financial, portfolio, roadmap, and cybersecurity use cases; established a SharePoint data foundation; defined UX and layout standards; and managed a team of contributors across bi-weekly delivery cycles.

Outcome

Directly contributed to winning new reporting engagements. Widely used across the consulting practice for proposal support. Recognized for outstanding design quality, consistency, and creativity in data scenario development.

Lead Designer · Power BI Developer · Project Coordinator

Power BI UX Systems Design Team Management Training & Coaching
2022–2023

Life Sciences · Cybersecurity

Cybersecurity PMO — Global Biotech Program

Served as the central PMO function for a large-scale, multi-stream cybersecurity program at a global life sciences organization. Owned governance, weekly coordination, ServiceNow administration, executive reporting, and cross-team communication — establishing a predictable delivery rhythm and clear leadership visibility across all initiatives.

Outcome

Recognized as the primary PMO point of contact and knowledge holder for ServiceNow. Established consistent governance documentation, improved decision-making quality, and earned strong satisfaction ratings from program leadership.

PMO Lead · Project Coordinator · Governance Manager

PMO Governance ServiceNow Executive Reporting Stakeholder Alignment
2024

FMCG · Global HR

Global HR KPI Framework & Tool Rollout Support

Coordinated the harmonization of 25+ HR KPIs across Corporate and regional Country teams for a global consumer goods company. Designed calculation logic, authored a comprehensive KPI booklet, built an automated PowerApps and Power Automate requirements-gathering solution, supported vendor evaluation, and created the north-star vision dashboard for leadership alignment.

Outcome

Delivered a unified KPI framework and calculation logic ready for direct implementation into the global HR tool. Rapid adoption of all deliverables. Positioned as a highly reliable and thoughtful consultant from day one.

Business Analyst · Project Coordinator · Stakeholder Manager

KPI Design Requirements Engineering PowerApps / Automate Vendor Evaluation
2024

Management Consulting · Capability Building

Presentation Design Workshop — Two-Day Training Program

Designed and delivered a complete two-day capability-building workshop covering slide design, data visualization, visual hierarchy, and storytelling. Created the full curriculum, before/after redesign examples, practical exercises, and reusable templates — and facilitated both days live.

Outcome

Measurable uplift in presentation quality across the team. Highly positive participant feedback. Described as "detailed, motivated, and immediately applicable to real consulting work."

Trainer · Curriculum Designer · Facilitator

Workshop Design Facilitation Presentation Coaching Data Visualization
